## Risk ID
RM-

## Hazard Description
<!-- What could go wrong? -->

## Hazardous Situation
<!-- How the hazard leads to harm -->

## Harm
<!-- What harm results? -->

## Severity
- [ ] Catastrophic (death/permanent injury)
- [ ] Critical (serious injury)
- [ ] Serious (injury requiring intervention)
- [ ] Minor (temporary discomfort)
- [ ] Negligible (inconvenience)

## Probability of Occurrence
- [ ] Frequent (>1 in 1,000)
- [ ] Probable (1 in 1,000 to 1 in 10,000)
- [ ] Occasional (1 in 10,000 to 1 in 100,000)
- [ ] Remote (1 in 100,000 to 1 in 1,000,000)
- [ ] Improbable (<1 in 1,000,000)

## Risk Level (Pre-Mitigation)
<!-- Based on severity x probability -->
- [ ] HIGH (unacceptable)
- [ ] MEDIUM (ALARP required)
- [ ] LOW (acceptable)

## Mitigation Strategy
<!-- How is this risk reduced? -->
1.

<!-- Requirements that implement mitigation -->
- #

<!-- Tests that verify mitigation effectiveness -->
- #

## Residual Risk Level (Post-Mitigation)
- [ ] HIGH
- [ ] MEDIUM
- [ ] LOW
